# Third-party image credits

All images used in the defense deck from this directory are sourced from
Wikimedia Commons under Creative Commons licenses. They are used for
educational (thesis defense) purposes with attribution.

| File | Wikimedia title | License | Used on slide |
|---|---|---|---|
| `mantis_eyes.jpg` | Mantis Shrimp Eyes.JPG | CC BY-SA 3.0 | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `mantis_full.jpg` | Curious mantis shrimp from Gilli Banta reef.JPG | CC BY-SA 3.0 | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `honeybee.jpg` | Honeybee (Apis mellifera) pollinating Avocado cv. Zutano flower.JPG | CC BY-SA | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `monarch_butterfly.jpg` | Male monarch butterfly.JPG | CC BY-SA | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `butterfly_wing.jpg` | Butterfly wing, detail.jpg | CC BY-SA | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `visible_spectrum.jpg` | Visible-spectrum.jpg | CC BY-SA | 6 (fluorescence) |
| `em_spectrum.jpg` | Visible and invisible light.jpg | CC BY-SA | 3 (vision in nature) |
| `em_spectrum_full.png` | Electromagnetic-Spectrum.png | CC BY-SA | (reserve) |
| `hsi_cube.png` | Mono, Multi and Hyperspectral Cube and corresponding Spectral Signatures.svg | CC BY-SA | 1, 4, 9 |
| `hsi_cube_alt.jpg` | HyperspectralCube.jpg | CC BY-SA | 7 (single-excitation HSI) |
| `jablonski.png` | Jablonski Diagram of Fluorescence Only.png | CC BY-SA | 6 (fluorescence) |
| `fluorescence_micro.jpg` | GFP Superresolution Christoph Cremer.JPG | CC BY-SA | 5 (biomedicine) |
| `fluorescent_minerals.jpg` | Fluorescent minerals hg.jpg | CC BY 3.0 (Hannes Grobe) | 6 (fluorescence) |
| `landsat_ethiopia.jpg` | LandSat-5 false color satellite image, Ethiopia, 2011-01-10.jpg | Public domain (NASA / USGS) | 4 (HSI applications) |
| `landsat_volcanoes.jpg` | 2015-06-09 Landsat 8 L1 - volcanoes, False Color.jpg | Public domain (NASA / USGS) | 4 (HSI applications) |

All images are accessible at:
`https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/<title>`

A consolidated credits slide is included as the second-to-last slide of the
defense deck.
